description: Validation rules for normalized inventory records. These rules validate structure, required fields, uniqueness, and basic data quality only.

rules.description: inventory_schema.json, inventory_validation_rules.json, sample_inventory.json, and validation report files must parse as valid JSON.

Every inventory record must include device_id, device_name, vendor, device_model, bios_version, firmware_version, operating_system, driver_versions, security_agents, management_tools, and inventory_timestamp.
Every device_id value must be unique within a sample inventory file.
operating_system must be an object containing at least name and version.
driver_versions, security_agents, and management_tools must be arrays. Each item must contain name and version.
inventory_timestamp must be parseable as an ISO 8601 date-time value.
Sample inventory must include 10 records and cover Dell, HP, Lenovo, Windows, Linux, and Ubuntu examples.
